description: Checklist configuration — controls which checklist is active for this project

availableChecklists.name: checklist-full.json
availableChecklists.description: Full audit checklist — all 10 sections based on reliance-grade financial model standards (FAST + Big Four)

switchInstructions: To switch checklists, update 'activeChecklist' to the filename you want to use (e.g., 'checklist-full.json'), or set 'active' to true for the desired checklist and false for others in availableChecklists.
